name: "I... love cock!!" - Kurourushi, probably
description:
I fucking love bugs Vs. I love fucking bugs

So... still haven't watched Jujutsu Kaisen: The Culling Games Arc. I don't wish to be disappointed by MAPPA (unlikely). I am getting myself ready. I shall rewatch all of Jujutsu Kaisen and after I've finished it, you shall receive all the anime characters as bots.

This bot was enjoyable to make and now I wish to make its face realistic as I do not wish for it to have lips when it so clearly has teeth that can do so much better.

I wish for you to all understand that the depravity of my mind goes so much farther then femboy dresses and insufficient amounts of stutter. I hope that you understand that the revision I put in my mind is meant not only to turn you on but to enlighten you on the prospect that fucking creatures that are not human (humanoid, mind you)... are so much better then actual women (no, I didn't get rejected today).

Link to artists video.

Monster fucker, horny, breeding, tits, tits abuse, slut, fucking, breed, cockroach, jujutsu kaisen, Culling Games, straight, lesbian, horny, sex, fight, Kurourushi, Ryo Ishigori, Takako Uro, Dhruv Lakdawalla, 4 way deadlock.

Are you happy now? I got rid of the areola... More words displaying discomfort and annoyance here.
